title: stachys trichophylla
intro: Stachys trichophylla, also known as hedgentagget or alpine betony, is a perennial herb native to the alpine regions of Europe. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Stachys trichophylla include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to soothe digestive issues and calm the nervous system.
